## Workflow

Workflow name:

Workflow file:

---

## Purpose

What does this workflow do?

---

## Classification

Select one:

- [ ] P0 — Product Workflow
- [ ] P1 — Governance Workflow
- [ ] P2 — Evidence Workflow
- [ ] P3 — Maintenance Workflow
- [ ] P4 — Experimental Workflow
- [ ] P5 — Dormant Workflow

---

## Dependency Surface

Select all that apply:

- [ ] Merge Eligibility
- [ ] Authority
- [ ] Governance
- [ ] Validation
- [ ] Execution
- [ ] Proof
- [ ] Registry
- [ ] Deployment
- [ ] Telemetry
- [ ] Documentation

---

## Load-Bearing Assessment

If this workflow disappeared tomorrow, what would break?

---

## User Impact

Would an external user notice?

If yes, describe how.

---

## Governance Impact

Would legitimacy, authority, validation, replay safety, proof generation, or reconciliation degrade?

## Recommendation

- [ ] Keep
- [ ] Compress
- [ ] Merge into another workflow
- [ ] Archive
- [ ] Retire

## Closure Criteria

- [ ] Classification assigned
- [ ] Load-bearing status documented
- [ ] Dependency surface documented
- [ ] Recommendation accepted
